name: lets-code
description: **Let's Code** is a high-performance, full-stack DSA (Data Structures and Algorithms) preparation platform. It is designed for developers to solve algorithmic challenges, follow structured learning paths, and engage in meaningful technical discussions with peers.

scripts.install-all: concurrently -n lets-code-backend,lets-code-frontend -c blue,red "npm install --prefix backend" "npm install --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n lets-code-backend,lets-code-frontend -c blue,red "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"

author: Pranava Pai N
